scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: this is now a Tier-1 bundle with real write capability (legacy was read-only, but writes.json is a genuinely new capability, not a migration of legacy write code -- see docs.md). Covers the core reporting/entity surface (ad accounts, campaigns, ad sets, ads, ad creatives, custom audiences, insights) and the two most common mutations (create/update campaign, create ad set). The AdAccount object's much larger edge surface (34+ edges per the official Python Business SDK's AdAccount class -- ad rules, playables, applications, async report jobs, business projects, saved audiences/keywords, ad labels, activities, and more) is excluded below with specific reasons; this is a deliberately practical, not maximal, expansion of a very large API.

excluded.reason: irreversible campaign deletion (Facebook's own docs recommend archiving/pausing instead); excluded pending a dedicated approval/risk review

creating an ad requires a pre-existing adcreative id and a fully-specified ad set; the natural incremental next mutation after create_campaign/create_ad_set is left for a future pass rather than guessing a minimal viable ad-creation payload
ad status/field update; deferred alongside ad creation itself (see POST /{ad_account_id}/ads)
ad set field update (budget/targeting/status changes); this pass covers ad-set CREATE only, update deferred to a future pass
irreversible ad set deletion; excluded pending a dedicated approval/risk review

ad creative creation requires a fully-specified object_story_spec (page id, link, image hash/video id) with a large, product-page-specific required-field surface; deferred rather than guessing a minimal contract
creating custom audiences (especially customer-list-hash-based) requires additional Meta platform terms acceptance and PII-hashing handling this bundle does not implement
the same insights rows are reachable, filtered by campaign_id, from the covered account-level 'insights' stream (level=ad, campaign_id field present on every row)
same reason as campaign-level insights: reachable via the covered account-level 'insights' stream's adset_id field
same reason as campaign-level insights: reachable via the covered account-level 'insights' stream's ad_id field
audit-log-style change-history feed, not a core business object stream
creative asset library (uploaded images), narrow supporting resource for ad creative construction, not core reporting/entity data
creative asset library (uploaded videos), same reason as adimages
organizational label catalog, narrow metadata not core business object data
automated-rule configuration, a distinct product feature (rule engine) not core ad-entity/reporting data
automated-rule execution history, same reason as adrules_library
conversion-tracking pixel catalog, narrow supporting resource not core reporting/entity data
connected-application catalog, account administration metadata not core ad data
account access-control/permissions listing, not core ad-entity data
async bulk-operation job status polling; a StreamHook-shaped async-polling capability this Pass B (Tier-1-only, no new hook packages) does not add
marketing-mix-modeling report subsystem, a distinct specialized reporting product beyond standard insights
lift-study experiment configuration/results, a distinct specialized measurement product
static targeting-taxonomy reference lookup, not account-specific business object data
Business Manager project organization, account administration metadata not core ad data
multi-location ads page-set configuration, a narrow specialized feature
saved-keyword-targeting library, narrow supporting resource not core ad-entity data
